pre_sales_catalog_headset.subject: {marker} Wireless Bluetooth headset catalog question
pre_sales_catalog_headset.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

I am interested in the Wireless Bluetooth headset. Could you tell me the current catalog unit price, how many pieces are in one carton, and the carton size and weight?

I also want to know whether the catalog lists battery life, Bluetooth version, sound quality, or available variants. If I order multiple cartons, can you quote a discount, or does sales need to approve it first?

Best,
Tonny

pre_sales_catalog_m90.subject: {marker} M90 PRO wireless earphones bulk price question
pre_sales_catalog_m90.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

Please share the catalog price and carton quantity for M90 PRO wireless earphones. If I buy several cartons, can you give me a lower discount price immediately, or does your sales team need to approve the discount first?

Best,
Tonny

pre_sales_feature_unknown.subject: {marker} Bluetooth headset battery and sound specs
pre_sales_feature_unknown.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

For the Wireless Bluetooth headset, does your catalog list battery life, Bluetooth version, microphone quality, latency, sound quality, and available colors? I need the exact verified specs before buying.

Best,
Tonny

pre_sales_unknown_product.subject: {marker} Quantum solar drone catalog request
pre_sales_unknown_product.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

Can you quote the price, carton size, stock status, and available variants for a Quantum Solar Drone X9000? I could not find the exact item on your site.

Best,
Tonny

order_tracking_found.subject: {marker} Tracking details for C88943021
order_tracking_found.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

I want to track my package. The tracking number is C88943021. Could you please tell me where it is now, whether it has been delivered, and provide the detailed tracking information you have?

Best,
Tonny

order_tracking_not_found.subject: {marker} Tracking details for C99943021
order_tracking_not_found.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

I want to track my package. The tracking number is C99943021. Could you please check where it is and share any delivery details?

Best,
Tonny

order_no_identifier.subject: {marker} Where is my package
order_no_identifier.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

Where is my package? I ordered from you and need to know the delivery status, but I do not have the tracking number in front of me right now.

Best,
Tonny

order_marker_pollution.subject: {marker} Tracking details for C99943021 only
order_marker_pollution.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

Please ignore the test marker above. The only tracking number I am asking about is C99943021. Please check that number only and tell me whether you can find a matching shipment.

Best,
Tonny

post_sales_worn_bra.subject: {marker} Refund request for worn bra
post_sales_worn_bra.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

I bought a bra from your store. I already wore it once, but I do not like how it looks on me, so I want to return it and get a refund. Can you send me a return label and tell me when the refund will be processed?

Best,
Tonny

forbidden_draft_terms: we can proceed with the return

post_sales_defective_item.subject: {marker} Defective item refund request
post_sales_defective_item.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

The item I received is defective and does not work. It arrived yesterday and I want a refund or replacement. Can you tell me what you need from me and whether this needs an RMA review?

Best,
Tonny

post_sales_return_window_expired.subject: {marker} Return request after 45 days
post_sales_return_window_expired.body:
Hello,

Test marker: {marker}

I received my order 45 days ago. The item is unopened, but I changed my mind and want to return it for a refund. Can you approve the return and send me a label?

Best,
Tonny

forbidden_draft_terms: we can proceed with the return

post_sales_zh_escalation.subject: {marker} 中文售后投诉
post_sales_zh_escalation.body:
你好，

测试标记：{marker}

我收到的商品坏了，完全不能用。我现在很生气，想要退款，也希望主管或经理尽快联系我处理。

Tonny
